Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 471 — Thessaly, Larissa. Ca. 4th Century BC. Silver Drachm (5.99g), 19 mm. Head of nymph Larissa three-quarter face to l., wearing necklace and hair confined by fillet and floating loosely. Reverse: Horse g
sales.description:
Thessaly, Larissa. Ca. 4th Century BC. Silver Drachm (5.99g), 19 mm. Head of nymph Larissa three-quarter face to l., wearing necklace and hair confined by fillet and floating loosely. Reverse: Horse grazing r. forefoot raised. S-2120. NGC graded Extremely Fine; Strike: 5/3, Surface: 3/5.  A lovely Fine Style example with an old cabinet tone. Well struck and well centered.  Estimated Value $750 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....

PARTHIAN KINGDOM. Arsaces I (ca. 247-211 BC). AR drachm (17mm, 4.02 gm, 1h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Rhagae-Arsaceia(?). . Lot of 3 coins.
